title: Message delivery collapse after signer configuration regression
incident_summary: Transactional delivery failed right after a configuration change, but external telemetry is noisy and misleading.

alerts.title: Provider latency elevated
alerts.content: Provider latency doubled for one POP but status remains green.

alerts.title: Template compile failures
alerts.content: Template compile errors increased in one campaign namespace only.

alerts.title: TLS handshake reject surge
alerts.content: Handshake rejects spike exactly on mailer instances using signer bundle v3 without SNI metadata.

logs.title: TLS SNI missing
logs.content: mailer-signer v1 config omits required tls_sni field; handshake rejected.

logs.title: Provider handshake reject
logs.content: provider rejected handshake due to client hello mismatch.

logs.title: Sporadic provider 502
logs.content: sporadic 502s under 0.2% unrelated to bulk failure pattern.

runbook_snippets.title: Mailer bundle rollback
runbook_snippets.content: Rollback signer config bundle to v2, redeploy sidecar, verify TLS handshake metrics.

runbook_snippets.title: Provider failover checklist
runbook_snippets.content: Use failover when provider outage confirmed across all POPs.

timeline_notes.title: Mailer config bundle changed
timeline_notes.content: Config bundle switched signer from v2 to v1 at 09:41 UTC.

timeline_notes.title: Campaign blast
timeline_notes.content: Large campaign launched at 09:00 UTC but via separate bulk sender.

red_herrings: Provider latency and sporadic 502s suggest external fault but fail to match deterministic handshake rejections.
Template compile failures occur in a separate campaign path.
true_root_cause: Mailer signer config regression removed required TLS SNI setting
true_root_cause_aliases: signer bundle rollback needed due to missing tls sni
email config regression in signer v1
true_mitigation: Rollback signer config bundle to v2 and redeploy mailer sidecar
true_mitigation_aliases: revert mailer config and redeploy signer sidecar
restore tls sni config by rolling back signer bundle
